notification.mission.assigned: We don give the waka to {{driver_name}}.
notification.package.delivered: Boss, I don drop the cargo {{package_id}}.
notification.package.in_transit: Your cargo {{package_id}} dey road. Driver na {{driver_name}}.
notification.package.at_hub: Your cargo {{package_id}} dey for hub {{hub_name}}, go pick am.
notification.package.deposit_confirmed: We don receive the cargo {{package_id}} for hub {{hub_name}}.
notification.delivery.assigned: New delivery work dey for cargo {{package_id}}.
notification.delivery.cancelled: Dem cancel the delivery for cargo {{package_id}}.
notification.delivery.rescheduled: Dem change the time for cargo {{package_id}} delivery.
error.route.unreachable: Road no dey for this side, rain don spoil am.
error.hub.full: Hub {{hub_name}} don full. Make you try another place.
error.driver.unavailable: No driver dey your side now.
error.payment.failed: Your {{amount}} {{currency}} payment no work. Try again.
status.hub.deposit: I don keep the cargo for {{hub_name}}.
status.hub.retrieved: Person don collect the cargo from {{hub_name}}.
blockchain.delivery.confirmed: Cargo {{package_id}} delivery don enter blockchain forever.
account.otp.sent: Your code na {{otp}}. E go expire for {{duration}} minutes.
notify.freelancer_org.verified: 🎉 Congrats! Dem don verify your organization {{orgId}} (KYC level {{kycLevel}}). You fit take mission now for TiiBnTick.
notify.freelancer_org.kyc_level_upgraded: ✅ Dem don upgrade KYC level for organization {{orgId}}: e don reach level {{kycLevel}} now. New features don dey.
notify.freelancer_org.kyc_rejected: ❌ Dem reject the KYC verification for organization {{orgId}}. Reason na {{reason}}. Abeg send new documents.
notify.freelancer_org.suspended: ⚠️ Dem don suspend your organization {{orgId}}. Reason na {{reason}}. Contact support make dem explain more.
notify.freelancer_org.unsuspended: ✅ Dem don remove the suspension for your organization {{orgId}}. You fit continue your work.
notify.freelancer_org.mission_assigned: 📦 Dem don assign mission to your organization {{freelancerOrgId}}. Delivery number na {{deliveryId}}.
notify.sub_deliverer.mission_assigned: 🏍️ New mission {{deliveryId}} don land for organization {{orgId}}. Prepare for pickup.
notify.billing.template_applied: 💼 Billing policy don ready from template {{templateCode}} by {{actorId}}. Policy ID na {{policyId}}.
CLIENT_QUOTE_RECEIVED: {{providerName}} don send you quote for your request {{quoteRequestId}}.
PROVIDER_NEW_QUOTE_REQUEST: New quote request don land from {{clientCity}} (ref. {{quoteRequestId}}).
ORDER_PAID: Dem don pay for order {{orderId}}: {{amountXaf}} XAF.
LISTING_REJECTED: Dem reject your listing {{listingId}}. Reason na {{reason}}.
